rationale: Educ. Code §7.1051 governs employment, compensation, and administrative support for board personnel. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or school funding formulas affected by the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote:
The chair of the board may:
(1) employ personnel as necessary to assist all members of the board in performing the board's duties;
_note: No conflict. Statute concerns board personnel matters only; no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemption amounts.
